title: Notes Image Aspect Ratio Fix & Routine File Upload

requirements.text: In the Notes view, remove any fixed aspect ratio constraints from image containers in NoteCard and NoteModal so that images display at their natural dimensions. The image container should resize to fit the actual image proportions, content should wrap naturally, and responsive behavior must be preserved. No fixed aspect ratio classes (e.g., aspect-video, aspect-square) should be applied to note image elements.

quotes: automatically adjust the image container's aspect ratio to perfectly fit each image's natural dimensions while maintaining responsive behavior

acceptanceCriteria: Images in the Notes list view (NoteCard) display at their natural width/height proportions without letterboxing or cropping
Images in the NoteModal display at their natural proportions
No fixed aspect-ratio CSS classes remain on note image containers
Layout remains responsive and does not break on mobile viewports
All other NoteCard and NoteModal styles, layout, and functionality are unchanged

requirements.text: Add a file upload feature to RoutinesPage by integrating the existing ImageUploadPicker component (frontend/src/components/common/ImageUploadPicker.tsx) identically to how it is used in the Notes section. The UI, styling, trigger button appearance, dropdown options (camera, gallery, file), outside-click/Escape dismissal behavior, and image handling logic must be copied exactly from the Notes implementation into the routine item flow. Do not alter any existing routine functionality, drag-and-drop, or other controls.

quotes: Add a file upload feature to the routine section using the exact same UI, styling, behavior, and functionality as the existing notes file upload
Copy the complete file upload component from notes and integrate it identically into routines

acceptanceCriteria: RoutinesPage displays the same image upload trigger (camera/gallery/file picker) as the Notes section
All three upload options (camera, gallery, file) are present and functional in the routine section
Outside-click and Escape key close the upload dropdown in routines, matching Notes behavior
Uploaded images are stored and displayed within routine items using the same logic as notes image storage
Existing routine functionality (drag-and-drop, add/edit/delete items, weekday/weekend/today tabs, import/export) remains completely unchanged
Visual styling of the upload component in routines is pixel-identical to the notes upload component

constraints: Do not modify any existing functionality, styles, or components outside of the two specified changes
Do not alter headers, footers, navigation, bottom tab bar, or sidebar
Maintain all existing responsive breakpoints and mobile layouts
Do not change backend logic or data models
Immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity, useActor, main.tsx, components/ui) must not be edited
nonGoals: Adding new note types or routine item types
Changing any styling outside of image container aspect ratio in Notes
Changes to any page other than NotesPage/NoteCard/NoteModal and RoutinesPage
